roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:D-602, JUDGE KIESSELBACH FOR BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION TO EXCLUDE HEARSAY EVIDENCE AND PEOPLES' MOTION TO ADMIT STATEMENT OF PARTY OPPONENT FILED/X:SFPD OFFICER JOSEPH MINNER, INVESTIGATING OFFICER, IS PRESENT WITH DISTRICT ATTORNEY//X:COURT REAFFIRMS ITS RULING TO ADMIT EXHIBITS 1A, 1B AND 1C/X:REQUEST TOEXCLUDE WITNESSES IS GRANTED/X:OFFICER KENNETH MACDONALD, SFPD, IS AFFIRMED AND RESUMES THE STAND FOR CROSS-EXAMINATION/X:OUTSIDE THE PRESENCE OF THE DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL, THE COURT CONDUCTS AN IN CAMERA HEARING/X:THE COURT ORDERS THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE IN CAMERA HEARING SEALED AND NOT TOBE TRANSCRIBED WITHOUT FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT/X:ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AND THE COURT FINDS THERE IA A PRIVELEGE TO MAINTAIN CONFIDENTIALITY OFTHE MARK ON THE CURRENCY PURSUANT TO EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 1040 AND THE COURT FINDS THE INFORMATION TO BE INMATERIAL/X:OFFICER THOMAS LEE, SFPD, IS AFFIRMED AND RECALLED TO THE STAND FOR FURTHER DIRECT AND CROSS-EXAMINATION//X:EXHIBITS BROUGHT TO THE COURTROOM TODAY ARE RETURNED TO PARTY SUBMITTINGTHEM/X:THE COURT DOES NOT FIND SUFFICIENT PROBABLE CAUSE TO HOLD THE DEFENDANTSTO ANSWER ON THE CHARGE OF 11352(A)HS, FELONY/MO PC 1385:UNABLE TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN OF PROOF/
